label: Improved
items: One ailment page everywhere: whether you tap a watchlist card, a search result, or a shared link, you get the same rich field-guide view — photos, symptoms, your garden's affected plants, and step-by-step prevention and treatment.
"Link to a plant" now works from your own watchlist entries too — spotted it on a plant? Two taps and the care tasks are scheduled.
The separate Ailment Library page is gone — the Ailments tab's search covers the whole field guide. Old bookmarks and shared links land in the right place automatically.
